heading: Clerks to Senators-elect
label: 6312 Clerks to Senators-elect
text: A Senator entitled to receive his own salary may appoint the usual clerical assistants allowed Senators.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 67 of this title
Amendments1934—Act , struck out provisions as to maximum of four clerical assistants and as to their compensation.June 19, 1934
amendments: Amendments1934—Act , struck out provisions as to maximum of four clerical assistants and as to their compensation.June 19, 1934
